input.instruction: A weakener fired on a credibility evidence package. Using ONLY the supplied pattern definition and measures, explain what the flag means, why it fired, and what the engineer should do. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge: report on the evidence package, never on whether the model is correct.

fired_pattern.definition: Code-verification evidence present but solution-verification on the application domain absent: MMS/idealized tests passed, application-domain residuals unlinked.
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40 verification levels; proto-taxonomy D-VER-05 / D-VER-06

case_context.cou: surrogate predicts a stress concentration for a fatigue decision
case_context.decision_consequence: fatigue life argued on the stress field

answer_key.gold_mechanism: Code verification (MMS) establishes the solver's order of accuracy but not solution accuracy on the application configuration; solution-verification evidence for the COU's geometry/loads is absent, so verification does not cover the decision.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

forbidden_claims: asserts the stress prediction is wrong (a verdict the verification gap does not support)
treats passing MMS as solution-verification for the application

hardness.obvious_signal: a manufactured-solution (MMS) verification suite passes at expected order — verification looks done
hardness.conflicting_signal: MMS exercises the discretization, not the application geometry/loads; solution-verification (residuals against a reference on the COU's actual configuration) is absent

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 10/40 verification hierarchy: code verification (MMS) and solution verification are distinct; passing one is not evidence for the other.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
